overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character wading through a shallow rocky stream in a mountainous forest, encountering a horse, and continuing along a sunlit dirt trail. The clip features high-fidelity natural environments with realistic water physics and lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky stream bed between large gray boulders

agents.ego_description: wading steadily through shallow stream water between mossy gray boulders and tall reeds

entered.detail: massive weathered gray rock formation flanking the right side of the stream
steep rocky mountainside visible in the background beyond the trees
dense coniferous trees covering the mountain slopes
clear shallow water with visible rocks and aquatic plants beneath the surface
long green grass and reeds growing in the shallow water along the stream edges

segments.scene_description: The character wades through a shallow rocky stream surrounded by massive gray boulders. Tall reeds and grasses grow from the water while pine-covered mountains rise in the background under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: stream bank transition with horse encounter

events.description: character exits the shallow water onto the muddy bank and grassy shore

agents.ego_description: approaching a horse in the water and following it onto the muddy shore

notable_agents.action: brown and white horse wading in the stream then trotting onto the bank ahead of the character

entered.detail: wet muddy ground at the water's edge where the stream meets the land
grassy terrain rising from the stream bank into the forest

segments.scene_description: A horse appears in the stream ahead, wading through the water. The character follows the animal as it exits onto the muddy bank, transitioning from the enclosed rocky stream to the open shoreline with grassy terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit forest trail ascending through pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill along a winding dirt path through the pine forest

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail cutting through the grass and trees
tall pine trees lining the left side of the forest path
tall pine trees lining the right side of the forest path
steep rocky slope rising on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a sunlit dirt trail winding through a dense pine forest. The path ascends gradually with a rocky hillside on the right and tall trees casting dappled shadows across the ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rocky mountain stream into the dappled light of a dense pine forest. It begins with the character wading through shallow water amidst massive gray boulders and tall reeds, with pine-covered mountains looming under a bright midday sun. As a horse appears in the stream ahead, the camera follows the animal as it exits the water and leads the character onto a muddy bank, transitioning from the enclosed waterway to an open, grassy shoreline. The scene then shifts as the character moves onto a sunlit dirt trail that winds upward through the forest. Finally, the path ascends along a rocky hillside, with towering trees casting shifting shadows across the ground.
